rationale: Both candidates correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError from the base tokenizer lacking extended ratio tokens and give the exact workaround (hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml) that FayeSpica confirmed in the thread, and both correctly anticipate Gaohan123's close-and-track-separately disposition. X is slightly stronger: it explains the pipeline/topology distinction in more depth, ties the fix to concrete guard code with the exact downstream behavior (_ratio_other_slices degrading cleanly), and adds a plausible extra observation (both YAML headers mislabeled 'Instruct') that maps onto the reporter's docs-fix request. Neither candidate surfaces the deeper regression cited by akshatvishu (PR #2713 removing mode-based filtering), which is a shared gap, but this doesn't change the actionable resolution since the workaround is identical.
